title: Fix contact info: update region to Île-de-France, restore email, phone, and address

requirements.summary: Update all occurrences of the region 'Occitanie' to 'Île-de-France' across all frontend components
acceptanceCriteria: ServiceAreas component lists communes relevant to Île-de-France (or at minimum removes Occitanie references)

file_operations.description: Replace any occurrence of 'Occitanie' with 'Île-de-France' in text content, aria labels, or data attributes
Replace any occurrence of 'Occitanie' with 'Île-de-France' in headlines, subheadings, or descriptive text
Replace any occurrence of 'Occitanie' with 'Île-de-France' in footer text, contact info descriptions, or service area mentions
Replace any occurrence of 'Occitanie' with 'Île-de-France' in contact section text, form labels, or descriptions
Replace any occurrence of 'Occitanie' with 'Île-de-France' in company description, stats labels, or strengths list text

Replace the current Val-d'Oise commune list with Île-de-France communes (covering Paris, Val-d'Oise, Hauts-de-Seine, Seine-Saint-Denis, Val-de-Marne, Seine-et-Marne, Yvelines, Essonne). Remove any references to Occitanie region or communes outside Île-de-France
Review customer testimonial locations and replace any 'Occitanie' locations with Île-de-France communes (e.g., Paris, Cergy, Argenteuil, Saint-Denis, Versailles, etc.)
Replace any occurrence of 'Occitanie' with 'Île-de-France' in service descriptions or feature list text

requirements.summary: Restore the company email address in the Contact section and Footer
acceptanceCriteria: A visible email address is rendered in the Contact section
A visible email address is rendered in the Footer
The email is clickable as a mailto link

file_operations.description: Add a visible email address display with a clickable mailto link in the contact information area. Use a canonical email address for Verdier Couverture (e.g., contact@verdiercouverture.fr or info@verdiercouverture.fr). Include an envelope icon from Lucide React for visual consistency

Add a visible email address with a clickable mailto link in the footer contact details section. Use the same canonical email as in Contact.tsx. Include an envelope icon from Lucide React for visual consistency

requirements.summary: Restore the company phone number in Navigation, Hero, Contact section, and Footer
acceptanceCriteria: A visible phone number is rendered in the Navigation bar
A visible phone number is rendered in the Hero quick-contact links
A visible phone number is rendered in the Contact section
A visible phone number is rendered in the Footer
The phone number is clickable as a tel: link

file_operations.description: Ensure the phone CTA button displays a visible phone number as clickable tel: link. Use a French mobile or landline format (e.g., 06 XX XX XX XX or 01 XX XX XX XX). Include a phone icon from Lucide React

Ensure the quick-contact links section includes a visible phone number as a clickable tel: link. Use the same phone number as in Navigation. Include a phone icon from Lucide React for visual consistency

Add a visible phone number display with a clickable tel: link in the contact information area. Use the same phone number as in Navigation and Hero. Include a phone icon from Lucide React for visual consistency

Add a visible phone number with a clickable tel: link in the footer contact details section. Use the same phone number as in other components. Include a phone icon from Lucide React for visual consistency

requirements.summary: Restore the company physical address in the Contact section and Footer reflecting Île-de-France location
acceptanceCriteria: A visible physical address is rendered in the Contact section
A visible physical address is rendered in the Footer
The address reflects an Île-de-France location (not Occitanie)

file_operations.description: Add a visible physical address display in the contact information area. The address must be located in Île-de-France (e.g., in Val-d'Oise, Paris, or another Île-de-France département). Include a map pin icon from Lucide React for visual consistency
Add a visible physical address in the footer contact details section. Use the same Île-de-France address as in Contact.tsx. Include a map pin icon from Lucide React for visual consistency
